hero.headline: Where K-Beauty Meets Forest Tranquility
hero.description: Advanced Korean skincare techniques in a soothing, nature-inspired space. Rediscover your calm, restore your glow.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Precision Care, Rooted in Nature
paragraphs: Forest Day Spa is a premium Korean-inspired wellness spa dedicated to skin health, scalp restoration, and total relaxation. We blend traditional Korean beauty philosophy with modern skin technology to offer not just treatments — but true transformation.

Our lead esthetician trained in Korea and brings years of hands-on experience in advanced facials, devices, and scalp care. Here, you're not just another appointment — you're a guest we genuinely care for.

features.title: Personalized Care
features.desc: Every treatment adjusted to your needs

services.name: Stay Beauty
services.description: Deep cleansing, facial massage with décolleté massage, premium ampoules, and a modeling mask for radiant skin.

services.name: Snow Beauty
services.description: Brightening facial with 4 premium vitamin ampoules, deep exfoliation, LED therapy, and a premium vitamin mask sheet.

services.name: Facial Contouring
services.description: Korean Gyeongrak lifting care with advanced devices to firm, contour, and naturally lift the skin.

services.name: Sono Beauty
services.description: Low-irritation Sono ultrasound facial to calm, balance, and refine skin for natural luminosity.

services.name: Reset Beauty
services.description: Aqua-Peel deeply cleanses pores and infuses hydration for beautifully radiant skin.

services.name: Gyeongrak Full Body
services.description: Korean-style full body massage with RF heat for total relaxation and improved circulation.

services.name: Partial Contouring
services.description: Choose upper or lower body for focused massage and circulation improvement.

services.name: Cellulite Reduction
services.description: Ultrasonic Cavitation and RF to break down stubborn cellulite and improve skin firmness.

services.name: Abdomen & Sides
services.description: Cavitation on stomach and love handles with skin tightening and lymphatic massage.

services.name: Back & Side Reduction
services.description: Ultrasonic Cavitation and RF suction for back area sculpting and side waist refinement.

services.name: Dress Care Sculpting
services.description: Sculpting treatment for collarbone, upper chest, and shoulder definition using RF.

services.name: Relaxing Head Spa
services.description: Aromatherapy, Gua-Sha, and scalp massage for tension release and nervous system balance.

services.name: Scalp Detox
services.description: Deep-cleansing detox to remove buildup and create a foundation for healthier hair growth.

services.name: Hair-Loss Restoration
services.description: LED therapy and RF stimulation to restore scalp vitality and promote regrowth.

services.name: Damaged Hair Restoration
services.description: Intensive scalp and hair repair treatment for chemically damaged hair.

membership.name: SOOP Membership
membership.subtitle: One included service credit per month
membership.title: Invest in Your Ongoing Wellness
membership.description: Designed for consistent, intentional care. Enjoy member-exclusive pricing and flexible benefits with no long-term commitment.
perks: Choose one service per month from Facial, Body, or Scalp Care menu
Upgrade anytime — pay only the difference
Member-exclusive service pricing on all treatments
Birthday month: 5% off retail products (up to $300)
No long-term commitment — flexible and easy to maintain

testimonials.text: Absolutely the best scalp treatment I've had in Carrollton. The 60-minute relaxing head spa melted all my stress away. I'm a member now and never looking back!
testimonials.author: Sarah J.

testimonials.text: The Facial Contouring treatment is incredible. My skin looked lifted and glowing for days. You can tell the esthetician really knows Korean skincare techniques.
testimonials.author: Michelle K.

testimonials.text: I love the SOOP membership. Getting monthly treatments at member pricing makes it so affordable. The atmosphere is serene and the staff is so caring.
testimonials.author: Jennifer L.

testimonials.text: I drove 30 minutes for this place and it's absolutely worth it. The Snow Beauty facial gave me the best glow I've ever had. Korean skincare is no joke!
testimonials.author: Amanda R.

faq.a: Our facials are based on Korean skincare techniques that focus on circulation, lymphatic flow, and skin balance. Hands-on massage is combined with professional devices for visible glow and long-term skin health.

faq.q: Can scalp care help with hair loss?
faq.a: Yes. By improving circulation and scalp balance, our treatments help reduce hair loss caused by stress, poor circulation, or scalp buildup. Monthly care is ideal for maintenance.
SOOP Membership includes one service credit per month for facial, body, or scalp care, along with member-exclusive pricing. It's $89/month with no long-term commitment.

faq.q: What is Gyeongrak deep tissue massage?
faq.a: Gyeongrak is a Korean technique that works along circulation and energy pathways. It focuses on depth and direction, helping reduce stagnation, swelling, and tightness.
Yes, we are highly booked. Walk-ins are not guaranteed. Please contact us by phone or our booking system to reserve your time.
Please notify us at least 24 hours in advance to avoid a 50% cancellation fee. For membership cancellation, 90-day notice is required.

contact.address: 2625 Old Denton Rd, Ste 450, Carrollton, TX 75007
contact.hours: Mon – Sat: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM | Sun: By Appointment Only
